name: 1.1 Patient Registration (MERGE)
cypher: MERGE (p:Patient {patientId: $id}) ON CREATE SET p.age=$age, p.gender=$gender, p.nationality=$nationality, p.educationLevel=$education ON MATCH SET p.age=$age RETURN p
gremlin: g.V().hasLabel('Patient').has('patientId', id).fold().coalesce(unfold(), addV('Patient').property('patientId', id).property('gender', gender).property('nationality', nationality).property('educationLevel', education)).property('age', age)

name: 1.1b Patient Lookup
cypher: MATCH (p:Patient {patientId:$id}) RETURN p.age AS age, p.gender AS gender, p.nationality AS nationality

name: 1.2 Patient Admission
cypher: MATCH (p:Patient {patientId:$patientId}) MATCH (h:HealthcareUnit {unitId:$unitId}) MATCH (d:Diagnosis {code:$diagnosisCode}) CREATE (a:Event:Admission {eventId:$eventId, date:$admissionDate, specialty:$specialty})-[:PERFORMED_AT]->(h) CREATE (p)-[:HAD_EVENT]->(a) CREATE (a)-[:HAS_DIAGNOSIS {type:'PRIMARY'}]->(d)

name: 1.3 Add Procedure to Admission (Chemotherapy)
cypher: MATCH (adm:Admission {eventId:$eventId}) MATCH (h:HealthcareUnit {unitId:$unitId}) CREATE (c:Event:Procedure:Chemotherapy {eventId: randomUUID(), date:$chemoDate, schema_1:$schema}) CREATE (adm)-[:INCLUDED_PROCEDURE]->(c) CREATE (c)-[:PERFORMED_AT]->(h)

name: 1.6 Create Healthcare Unit
cypher: MATCH (s:State {stateCode:$stateCode}) MERGE (h:HealthcareUnit {unitId:$unitId}) ON CREATE SET h.state_code=$stateCode MERGE (h)-[:LOCATED_IN]->(s)

name: 2.1 Patient Demographics (Gender)
cypher: MATCH (p:Patient) RETURN p.gender AS gender, count(p) AS numberOfPatients ORDER BY numberOfPatients DESC

name: 2.2 Admissions per Hospital (Year)
cypher: MATCH (a:Admission)-[:PERFORMED_AT]->(h:HealthcareUnit) WHERE a.date STARTS WITH $year RETURN h.unitId AS hospital, count(a) AS numberOfAdmissions ORDER BY numberOfAdmissions DESC LIMIT 20

name: 2.3 Top Primary Diagnoses
cypher: MATCH (e:Event)-[r:HAS_DIAGNOSIS]->(d:Diagnosis) WHERE r.type='PRIMARY' RETURN d.code AS diagnosisCode, count(e) AS totalEvents ORDER BY totalEvents DESC LIMIT 25

name: G1 Patient Timeline (bounded)
cypher: MATCH (p:Patient {patientId:$patientId})-[:HAD_EVENT]->(e:Event) WITH e ORDER BY e.date ASC RETURN [label IN labels(e) WHERE label <> 'Event' | label][0] AS eventType, e.eventId AS eventId, e.date AS date LIMIT toInteger(coalesce($limit,25))

name: G2 Similar Patients via Shared Primary Diagnoses
cypher: MATCH (p:Patient {patientId:$patientId})-[:HAD_EVENT]->(:Event)-[:HAS_DIAGNOSIS {type:'PRIMARY'}]->(d:Diagnosis) WITH p, d LIMIT toInteger(coalesce($k,20)) MATCH (d)<-[:HAS_DIAGNOSIS {type:'PRIMARY'}]-(:Event)<-[:HAD_EVENT]-(o:Patient) WHERE o <> p RETURN o.patientId AS similarPatient, count(*) AS shared ORDER BY shared DESC LIMIT toInteger(coalesce($limit,25))

name: G3 Unit -> Next Units by Same Patients
cypher: MATCH (u:HealthcareUnit {unitId:$unitId})<-[:PERFORMED_AT]-(a:Admission)<-[:HAD_EVENT]-(p:Patient) WITH DISTINCT p, a, u MATCH (p)-[:HAD_EVENT]->(b:Admission)-[:PERFORMED_AT]->(v:HealthcareUnit) WHERE b.date > a.date AND v <> u RETURN v.unitId AS toUnit, count(DISTINCT p) AS patients ORDER BY patients DESC LIMIT toInteger(coalesce($limit,25))

name: G4 Diagnosis -> Frequent Procedure Types
cypher: MATCH (d:Diagnosis {code:$diagnosisCode})<-[:HAS_DIAGNOSIS]-(:Event)<-[:HAD_EVENT]-(p:Patient)-[:HAD_EVENT]->(e:Event:Procedure) WITH e, [lab IN labels(e) WHERE lab <> 'Event' AND lab <> 'Procedure'][0] AS procLabel RETURN coalesce(procLabel,'Procedure') AS procedureType, count(e) AS freq ORDER BY freq DESC LIMIT toInteger(coalesce($limit,25))

name: G5 Patient Two-Hop Peers via Same Unit (same month)
cypher: MATCH (p:Patient {patientId:$patientId})-[:HAD_EVENT]->(a:Admission)-[:PERFORMED_AT]->(u:HealthcareUnit) WITH p, a, u, substring(a.date,0,6) AS ym MATCH (o:Patient)-[:HAD_EVENT]->(b:Admission)-[:PERFORMED_AT]->(u) WHERE o <> p AND substring(b.date,0,6)=ym RETURN o.patientId AS peer, count(*) AS coVisits ORDER BY coVisits DESC LIMIT toInteger(coalesce($limit,25))

name: G6 K-hop Ego Network (Patient)
cypher: WITH $patientId AS pid MATCH (p:Patient {patientId:pid}) MATCH path=(p)-[:HAD_EVENT|PERFORMED_AT]-() WITH 1 AS hops, count(*) AS paths WHERE hops <= toInteger($maxHops) RETURN hops, paths UNION ALL WITH $patientId AS pid MATCH (p:Patient {patientId:pid}) MATCH path=(p)-[:HAD_EVENT|PERFORMED_AT*2]-() WITH 2 AS hops, count(*) AS paths WHERE hops <= toInteger($maxHops) RETURN hops, paths UNION ALL WITH $patientId AS pid MATCH (p:Patient {patientId:pid}) MATCH path=(p)-[:HAD_EVENT|PERFORMED_AT*3]-() WITH 3 AS hops, count(*) AS paths WHERE hops <= toInteger($maxHops) RETURN hops, paths UNION ALL WITH $patientId AS pid MATCH (p:Patient {patientId:pid}) MATCH path=(p)-[:HAD_EVENT|PERFORMED_AT*4]-() WITH 4 AS hops, count(*) AS paths WHERE hops <= toInteger($maxHops) RETURN hops, paths

name: G7 Diagnosis Co-occurrence (anchored)
cypher: MATCH (d1:Diagnosis {code:$diagnosisCode})<-[:HAS_DIAGNOSIS]-(e:Event)-[:HAS_DIAGNOSIS]->(d2:Diagnosis) WHERE d1<>d2 RETURN d2.code AS coDiagnosis, count(e) AS coCount ORDER BY coCount DESC LIMIT toInteger(coalesce($limit,25))
